programme.title: Ep. 1
programme.desc: In questa puntata diamo uno sguardo a quattro dei piu' illustri allenatori che hanno vinto la UEFA Champions League: Alex Ferguson, Jupp Heynckes, Luis Enrique e Fabio Capello.

programme.title: Crystal Palace - Rayo Vallecano Finale
programme.desc: ... Finale UEFA Conference League. - Entrambe per conquistare il primo trofeo europeo. Inglesi alla prima partecipazione. Rayo Vallecano alla seconda, dopo i quarti di coppa UEFA nel 2001. TC: Ciarravano-Minotti

programme.title: Paris - Bayern M. 2020
programme.desc: ... Bayern Monaco UEFA Champions League Story. - Un club francese in finale mancava dal 2004 (Monaco), poi sconfitto dal Porto. Il Bayern torna a disputare una finale di Champions dopo 7 anni. TC: Trevisani-Adani.

programme.title: Manchester City - Inter
programme.desc: ... Champions League. - City per il secondo trofeo europeo dopo una Coppa delle Coppe nel 1970. Inter per la seconda Champions League dopo quella del 2010. In bacheca anche 2 Coppe dei Campioni. TC: Caressa-Bergomi.

programme.title: Borussia Dortmund - Real Madrid
programme.desc: ... Champions League. - Tedeschi alla terza finale di UCL: una vinta nel 1997 e una persa nel 2013. Real alla sesta in 11 stagioni con 5 vittorie. Ha vinto gli ultimi 2 precedenti. TC: Zancan-Marchegiani.

programme.title: Paris - Inter
programme.desc: Nerazzurri per la seconda Champions, dopo quella vinta nel 2010 (2-0 sul Bayern). Francesi per la prima, dopo il ko in finale contro il Bayern nel 2020 (0-1). TC: Caressa-Bergomi

programme.title: Scozia - Curaçao
programme.desc: ... Amichevoli. - Entrambe sconfitte nelle ultime amichevoli: la Scozia dal Giappone (0-1) e dalla Costa d'Avorio (0-1); Curacao dalla Cina (2-0) e dall'Australia (5-1). TC: Flippo Benincampi

programme.title: 2007 Djokovic v Federer
programme.desc: At the 2007 Canadian Open, Novak Djokovic defeated the world's top three players in successive matches en route to his second Masters title, including victory in the final over Federer.

programme.title: 2009 Djokovic v Monfils
programme.desc: In one of the most dramatic finals Bercy has ever seen, Novak Djokovic and Gael Monfils went toe to toe in a tightly fought, three-set battle for the 2009 Rolex Paris Masters title.

programme.title: 2011 Djokovic v Nadal
programme.desc: In the 2011 Madrid Open final at the Caja Magica, Novak Djokovic inflicted the first clay-court defeat on Rafael Nadal in nearly two years to claim his fifth title of the year.

programme.title: 2011 Djokovic v Nadal
programme.desc: During a year in which Novak Djokovic dominated Rafael Nadal, one of the Serb's most high-profile victories over the legendary Spaniard came in the final of the 2011 US Open.

programme.title: 2012 Djokovic v Murray
programme.desc: After saving five championship points, Novak Djokovic roared back to dethrone the two-time reigning Shanghai Masters champion Andy Murray in an epic, three-set 2012 thriller.

programme.title: 2012 Djokovic v Federer
programme.desc: With the 2012 season-ending title on the line at the O2 Arena, two-time defending champion Roger Federer looked to deny world number one Novak Djokovic a second ATP world title.

programme.title: 2013 Djokovic v Nadal
programme.desc: In the 2013 final of the Monte-Carlo Rolex Masters, Novak Djokovic brought an end to Rafael Nadal's eight-year reign as champion in the Principality.

programme.title: FNF: Liverpool v Bournemouth Hlts

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Régis Le Bris' Sunderland open their top-flight account at home to Graham Potter's West Ham United. The Hammers have lost more opening Premier League fixtures than any other side. (16.08)

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: Steering Brighton to eighth, Fabian Hurzeler's second season begins against Fulham, whose unbeaten top-flight record over the Seagulls came to an end when the two last met. (16.08)

programme.title: PL: Spurs v Burnley Hlts

programme.title: SNF: Wolves v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: On the first Saturday Night Football of the Premier League season, Manchester City visit Vitor Pereira's Wolves. Can Pep Guardiola get City back on track after a campaign to forget? (16.08)

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Starting afresh after a summer upheaval, new boss Keith Andrews takes Brentford to the City Ground on Premier League opening weekend for a Super Sunday meeting with Forest. (17.08)

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Crystal Palace Hlts

programme.title: PL: Man Utd v Arsenal Hlts
programme.desc: On Super Sunday, United and Arsenal open their Premier League seasons at Old Trafford. With both sides boasting new forward lines, who will start their campaign off with a bang? (17.08)

programme.title: MNF: Leeds Utd v Everton Hlts

programme.title: FNF: West Ham v Chelsea

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: Up and running with a memorable 3-0 win over West Ham, Sunderland venture to fellow new boys Burnley - who began life back in the Premier League with defeat in the capital. (23.08)

programme.title: PL: Bournemouth v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: Impressing in defeat at Anfield on opening night, Bournemouth return to the Vitality for Wolves' Premier League visit. Vitor Pereira's side lost 4-0 at home to City last week. (23.08)

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Aston Villa Hlts
programme.desc: Keith Andrews takes charge of his first Premier League home game at Brentford against Aston Villa. Ten-man Villa held Newcastle to a draw at Villa Park last weekend. (23.08)

programme.title: SNF: Arsenal v Leeds Hlts

programme.title: PL: Everton v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: Everton welcome Brighton to the Hill Dickinson Stadium on a historic day for the Merseyside club. The Toffees tasted defeat to newly promoted Leeds at the start of the week. (24.08)

programme.title: PL: C. Palace v Nott'm Forest Hlts
programme.desc: Crystal Palace and Nottingham Forest - two teams who dominated headlines throughout the summer - go toe to toe in a fiery Premier League clash on Super Sunday at Selhurst Park. (24.08)

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Man Utd Hlts
programme.desc: Ruben Amorim's much-improved Manchester United go in search of their first Premier League win of 2025-26 with a Super Sunday trip to face Marco Silva's Fulham at Craven Cottage. (24.08)

programme.title: MNF: Newcastle v Liverpool Hlts
programme.desc: On Monday Night Football, the transfer saga of the summer plays second fiddle as Newcastle and Liverpool enter a raucous St James' Park atmosphere for a Premier League clash. (25.08)

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: League 1 22/23
programme.desc: The Sky Bet League One play-off final at Wembley sees Barnsley take on Sheffield Wednesday, a side who pulled off one of the greatest comebacks in play-off history to arrive here. (29.05)

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: League 2 22/23
programme.desc: The Sky Bet League Two play-off final at Wembley pits Carlisle United against Stockport County, as a place in League One for next season hangs in the balance. (28.05)

programme.title: EFL 18/19: Aston Villa v Sheff Utd
programme.desc: In 2019 at Villa Park, Tyrone Mings, Tammy Abraham and Andre Green saved Villa's blushes, scoring three goals in the final 10 minutes to steal a point from the visiting Sheffield United.

programme.title: EFL 18/19:Leeds Utd v Derby County
programme.desc: Frank Lampard's Derby go to Elland Road for the second leg of their 2018-19 Sky Bet Championship play-off semi-final with Marcelo Bielsa's Leeds, with the odds stacked against them.

programme.title: EFL 18/19: Charlton v Doncaster
programme.desc: Two matches of Sky Bet League 1 semi-final play-off action couldn't separate Charlton Athletic and Doncaster Rovers in 2019, as a date at Wembley hinged on a dramatic penalty shootout.

programme.title: EFL 21/22: Coventry City v Fulham
programme.desc: In October 2021, Coventry took Fulham to the sword, putting four past the travelling west Londoners who eventually went on to secure Premier League promotion.

programme.title: Retro L1 19: Charlton v S'land
programme.desc: A chance to look back at a classic League One play-off final, as Charlton and Sunderland go head-to-head in the 2019 final at Wembley. It was to go right to the wire...

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: C'Ship 16/17
programme.desc: Huddersfield Town meet Reading in the Sky Bet Championship play-off final at Wembley. The most valuable game in football, the final place in next season's Premier League awaits the winner.

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: League 1 16/17
programme.desc: Bradford City face Millwall at Wembley in the Sky Bet League 1 play-off final, as the teams battle for a spot in next season's Sky Bet Championship.

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: League 2 16/17
programme.desc: Exeter City meet Blackpool at Wembley Stadium in the final of the Sky Bet League 2 play-offs. The two meetings in the season ended in a draw and a Blackpool win.

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: League 1 23/24
programme.desc: Wembley Stadium hosts the Sky Bet League One play-off final, as Bolton Wanderers face Oxford United. Who will emerge victorious and climb back into the second tier? (18.05)

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: League 2 23/24
programme.desc: The Sky Bet League Two play-off final at Wembley sees Crawley - hot off an 8-1 aggregate win over MK Dons - face Crewe Alexandra, who overturned a 2-0 first-leg deficit to get here. (19.05)

programme.title: EFL 13/14: Sheff Weds v Leeds Utd
programme.desc: Relive a classic match from the Football League. Here, Yorkshire rivals Sheffield Wednesday and Leeds United meet at Hillsborough in January 2014 in a memorable game for the Owls.

programme.title: EFL 13/14: Derby County v N.Forest
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic clash from the English Football League. Here, Derby County meet Nottingham Forest in the Sky Bet Championship.

programme.title: EFL 13/14: QPR v N. Forest
programme.desc: Relive a classic match from the English Football League. Here, QPR host Nottingham Forest at Loftus Road in the 2013-14 season in a seven-goal thriller.

programme.title: EFL 14/15: Brentford v Fulham
programme.desc: Relive some classic action from the English Football League. Here, a west London derby in the Sky Bet Championship between Brentford and Fulham at Griffin Park in November 2014.

programme.title: Retro C'Ship SF 19: Leeds v Derby
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic clash from the Championship play-offs. Here, a dramatic semi-final second leg from the 2018-19 season as Leeds and Derby went head-to-head at Elland Road.

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: C'Ship 17/18
programme.desc: Fulham and Aston Villa meet in the Sky Bet Championship play-off final at Wembley. Villa are looking to end a two-year exile from the Premier League, Fulham were last there in 2014.

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: League 1 17/18
programme.desc: Rotherham United take on Shrewsbury Town at Wembley in the Sky Bet League One play-off final. The sides each beat each other once during the regular season.

programme.title: EFL Play-Off Final: League 2 17/18
programme.desc: Coventry City and Exeter City go head-to-head in the Sky Bet League Two play-off final at Wembley. The sides each beat each other once during the regular season.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Leeds Utd v Aston Villa
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Leeds United face Aston Villa in the Sky Bet Championship, with the sides meeting in the league for the first time since 2004.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Huddersfield v Leeds
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, a West Yorkshire derby as Huddersfield Town play Leeds United in 2017 in the Sky Bet Championship.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Sheff Weds v Newcastle
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Sheffield Wednesday take on Newcastle United in 2017 in the Sky Bet Championship, with both sides looking for promotion chances.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Fulham v Aston Villa
programme.desc: Remember some classic matches from English football. In this episode, Fulham looked to maintain their playoff hopes against Aston Villa in the Sky Bet Championship in April 2017.

programme.title: Retro C'Ship 00: B'burn v Man City
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic clash from the second tier from over the years. Here, back in 2000, Blackburn Rovers and Manchester City go head-to-head in a memorable First Division clash.

programme.title: EFL P/O 16-17: Exeter v Carlisle
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, a League Two play-off semi-final second leg between Exeter City and Carlisle during the 2016-17 season.

programme.title: EFL P/O 16-17: Luton v Blackpool
programme.desc: A look back at a classic match from the English Football League. Here, Luton Town host Blackpool in the play-offs in Sky Bet League Two at Kenilworth Road in the 2016/2017 campaign.

programme.title: EFL P/O 18-19: Leeds Utd v Derby
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Leeds and Derby fought in the second leg of their Championship play-off semi-final.

programme.title: EFL P/O 22-23: Sheff Weds v P'boro
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Sheffield Wednesday and Peterborough met in the second leg of a 2022-23 League One play-off semi-final.

programme.title: Bundesliga Special
programme.desc: An in-depth review of the 2025-26 Bundesliga campaign.

programme.title: Scottish Premiership Goals 2025/26
programme.desc: A look at the finest strikes from the 2025-26 Scottish Premiership season.

programme.title: Martin O'Neill: Champion Again
programme.desc: The champions of Scotland look back on an unforgettable season in the Scottish Premiership.

programme.title: Scottish Premiership Round Up Show
programme.desc: A round-up of the goals from the latest weekend of Scottish Premiership action during the 2025-26 season.

programme.title: EFL: The Play-Offs at 40
programme.desc: Marking the 40th season since the play-offs were introduced for the 1986-87 campaign, take a look back at the history of the iconic set of high-stakes fixtures that always deliver drama.

programme.title: WSL: West Ham v Manchester City
programme.desc: This season's Barclays Women's Super League champions Manchester City bring their victorious campaign to a close with a trip to an in-form West Ham. (16.05)

programme.title: EFL P/O 13-14: Derby County v QPR
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Derby and QPR met at Wembley in the 2013-14 play-off final.

programme.title: EFL P/O 14-15: Preston v Chester'd
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Preston's semi-final second leg with Chesterfield in the 2014-15 League One play-offs.

programme.title: EFL P/O 14-15: Swindon v Sheff Utd
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Swindon and Sheffield United met in the second leg of their 2014-15 League One play-off semi-final.

programme.title: EFL P/O 16-17: Bradford v Millwall
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Bradford City and Millwall contested the 2016-17 League One play-off final at Wembley.

programme.title: C'Ship Playoff SF: 2025-26
programme.desc: Hull and Millwall get the Sky Bet Championship play-offs underway with an opening-leg contest at the MKM Stadium. Hull snuck in with final-day victory over Norwich last Saturday. (08.05)

programme.title: C'Ship Playoff SF: 2025-26
programme.desc: Aiming to bounce back to the Premier League at the first time of asking, Southampton's Sky Bet Championship play-off campaign starts away to Kim Hellberg's Middlesbrough. (09.05)

programme.title: C'Ship Playoff SF: 2025-26
programme.desc: Millwall and Hull's finely poised Sky Bet Championship play-off semi-final enters its second leg at the Den. The two played out a goalless draw last Friday. (11.05)

programme.title: C'Ship Playoff SF: 2025-26
programme.desc: A St Mary's decider gets underway in the Sky Bet Championship play-offs as Southampton entertain Middlesbrough following last Saturday's opening-leg stalemate. (12.05)

programme.title: C'Ship Playoff Final: 2025-26
programme.desc: The last remaining spot in next season's Premier League is decided at Wembley as Hull and Middlesbrough contest one of football's richest games - the Championship play-off final. (23.05)

programme.title: Bundesliga Special
programme.desc: An in-depth review of the 2025-26 Bundesliga campaign.

programme.title: EFL Cup 25/26 Semi-Final
programme.desc: The current Carabao Cup holders Newcastle host the first leg of this two-legged semi-final against Pep Guardiola's Manchester City at St James' Park. (13.01)

programme.title: EFL Cup 25/26 Semi-Final
programme.desc: New Chelsea boss Liam Rosenior occupies the Stamford Bridge dugout for the first time as his side take on Arsenal in the first leg of this EFL Cup semi-final. (14.01)

programme.title: EFL Cup 25/26 Semi-Final
programme.desc: Trailing 3-2 on aggregate, Liam Rosenior's Chelsea head to the Emirates Stadium for the second leg of this two-legged Carabao Cup semi-final clash with Mikel Arteta's Arsenal. (03.02)

programme.title: EFL Cup 25/26 Semi-Final
programme.desc: Two goals up and in firm control of this EFL Cup semi-final tie, Manchester City look to finish off the holders Newcastle and join Premier League title rivals Arsenal at Wembley. (04.02)
